title: Python Full Path
description: Large change (> 100 lines, cross-file) or complex refactor. Full process with plan gate, Qwen3.7 subagent review, both Sourcery passes. Stops at PR — user handles CI, review, merge.

tasks.title: Context Read
tasks.description: Read relevant code, understand the problem space. Check logs, related files, existing tests. Research APIs/constraints if feature work.

tasks.title: ⏸ GATE: Approve Plan
tasks.description: Human gate. Present the implementation plan to the user. Wait for explicit approval before proceeding.

tasks.title: TDD: Write Failing Tests
tasks.description: Write regression/behaviour tests that capture the expected change. Every new code path should have a test.

tasks.title: Implement
tasks.description: Write the actual code change. Keep it focused on the issue — no scope creep.

tasks.title: ruff + pytest
tasks.description: Run linter and test suite. Fix any issues before proceeding to review.

tasks.title: Qwen3.7 Code Review
tasks.description: Spawn a Qwen3.7 subagent to review the diff. Prompt: 'Review the PR diff critically. Find bugs, quality issues, edge cases, regressions. Be harsh.'

tasks.title: Fix Review Issues
tasks.description: Address all findings from Qwen3.7 review. Fix bugs, edge cases, quality issues.

tasks.title: Re-run checks
tasks.description: Run ruff + pytest again after fixing review issues.

tasks.title: Self-Review
tasks.description: Read through the entire diff line by line. Check logic errors, all callers updated, edge cases, message correctness, test coverage, consistency.

tasks.title: Sourcery CLI
tasks.description: Run `sourcery review <files>` locally. Different ruleset from GH App.
acceptance_criteria: Sourcery CLI passes or findings addressed

tasks.title: Sourcery GH App
tasks.description: Comment @sourcery-ai review on the PR. Address findings.
acceptance_criteria: Sourcery GH App findings reviewed and addressed
